items.blinded_text:
This market is about whether any player achieves a Event A during Game 2. In Entity A, a Event A occurs when a single player kills all 5 enemy champions in rapid succession. This market will resolve to "Yes[identifying quotation removed]No[identifying quotation removed]No". If Game 2 is remade, resolution will be based on the remade game only. The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
https://gol.gg/esports/home
